name: Self-healing repair: coverage-gap-senolytics-safety-tables-followup-3
summary: Aggregate adverse-event counts, the D+Q bone headache preferred-term row, additional publication-table preferred-term rows, and registry/article discontinuation fields have been extracted for the D+Q bone RCT. IPF and AD-risk now have PubMed EFetch source-snapshot-backed abstract safety extraction, and DKD has a metadata-only source-snapshot-backed record documenting that adverse-event counts were not reported in the retained abstract summary. Full article/table safety extraction for DKD, IPF, AD-risk, D+Q bone supplement material, and harmonized cross-human adverse-event definitions remain incomplete. Suggested action: Run retained full-text or table-row extraction for DKD, IPF, and AD-risk safety details, reconcile any D+Q bone supplement safety tables, and create a cross-human safety compatibility group only after event terms, denominators, zero semantics, relatedness, and seriousness are harmonized.
